since_last: 85% of 89 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +4.05%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 85% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.96% · BTC -0.40% · Gold -0.63% · Nasdaq100 +1.39%. 85% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +4.05%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +4.05%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -1.57%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: HON is the standout at -46.47%
cards.body: Leaders: MDB +6.41%, CRWD +6.26%, PANW +6.05%, AMAT +6.02%, BIDU +5.59%. Laggards: HON -46.47%, MU -3.79%, INTC -3.27%, ARM -3.26%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.63% at $155.73
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.63% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
